title: Vaghenu, a meter aware sloka-to-chant, TTS for Sanskrit
abstract:
A 15-year-old dream has come true today. I started a PhD with the dream of creating a system that chants any Sanskrit shloka perfectly.

And here I am opening sourcing Vaghenu, a meter aware sloka-to-chant, TTS for Sanskrit . This is the world's first vrutta-aware, open-source TTS for Sansk
abstract_zh: 十五年前的:'.$(\text{闭眼冥想一秒钟})$梦想今天终于实现了！我从博士起点出发，立志为所有人带来完美诵读梵文格言的技术。现在，我要向你们介绍Vaghenu——一个会计量韵律的开源TTS工具，让你在家就能感受古印度文字的魅力！快来试试，保证你念经都不打磕巴！
